title: Sample Project
description: Short card description used by the homepage Featured Projects cards.

details.summary: One focused sentence that introduces the project on the dedicated /projects page.
details.role: What you personally owned, contributed, designed, built, tested, or coordinated.
details.status: Published, Prototype, In Progress, Archived, or another concise state.
details.timeline: Year, date range, or project phase.
highlights: Notable user-facing feature, engineering decision, or project outcome.
Another concise proof point that helps the project stand out.
technicalChallenges: A hard implementation detail, tradeoff, constraint, or lesson learned.
Another challenge that shows technical judgment.

title: This Website
description: A high-performance, SEO-optimized web application built with modern frameworks to showcase my resume and portfolio.

details.summary: A fast, SEO-focused portfolio site built with Astro and Tailwind to showcase my resume, projects, technical skills, and contact paths in one polished web experience.
details.role: Customized an existing Astro portfolio template to fit my content, branding, project structure, and deployment needs. I also configured a Cloudflare Worker workflow so the live site automatically rebuilds and updates when changes are pushed to the repository.
highlights: Data-driven content keeps profile, career, tech, and project sections easy to update.
Astro and Tailwind support a fast static site with reusable section components.
Theme-aware styling and optimized local assets keep the portfolio polished across viewports.
technicalChallenges: Adapting the existing template without overcomplicating the site structure.
Keeping resume, project, and technical content easy to maintain through local data files.
Setting up an automated deployment flow from GitHub to the live Cloudflare-hosted site.

title: Kube Pulse
description: A Go CLI that connects to a local Kubernetes cluster and summarizes workload health.

details.summary: A lightweight Go CLI that connects to a local Kubernetes cluster and turns workload health data into a clear terminal summary for faster inspection and triage.
details.role: Built the CLI workflow, connected it to local Kubernetes data, and shaped the output around quick workload triage.
highlights: Uses Go to keep the CLI implementation small, direct, and portable.
Focuses on local Kubernetes clusters where fast feedback and clear terminal output matter.
Frames workload health as a concise summary instead of raw cluster data.
technicalChallenges: Choosing the right level of detail so the output is useful without becoming noisy.
Working with Kubernetes concepts through a CLI-focused learning project.

title: Home Bar
description: Home Bar is a native Android cocktail app shaped through structured AI prompts, from feature buckets to testing and implementation reports.

details.summary: A native Android cocktail app experiment that uses structured AI prompts to move from feature buckets and planning into tested Kotlin implementation work.
details.role: Defined prompt workflows, organized feature buckets, reviewed implementation reports, and guided Kotlin Android changes.
highlights: Uses structured AI prompts as part of the planning and implementation workflow.
Explores how feature buckets can keep mobile app scope clear before coding starts.
Connects implementation work back to testing and completion reports.
technicalChallenges: Keeping AI-assisted changes narrow enough to review, test, and iterate safely.
Maintaining native Android project quality while using prompts to accelerate planning and implementation.
Translating prompt outputs into concrete Kotlin UI and behavior changes.

title: Agentikit
description: Agentikit is a reusable kit of AGENTS.md rules, workflow skills, and guidance docs for safer, clearer, coding-agent work across repositories.

details.summary: A reusable coding-agent workflow kit that packages AGENTS.md rules, workflow skills, and guidance docs to make agent-assisted development clearer, safer, and easier to repeat across repositories.
details.role: Crafted and refined the repository guidance, workflow skills, and supporting documentation patterns for repeatable agent collaboration.
highlights: Packages AGENTS.md guidance so repository expectations are explicit before coding starts.
Provides workflow skills for planning, long tasks, and completion reporting.
Focuses on safer, clearer coding-agent work across repositories.
technicalChallenges: Making guidance specific enough to be useful without forcing every repository into the same workflow.
Separating durable project rules from task-specific plans and temporary handoff notes.
Designing instructions that improve agent behavior while staying practical for day-to-day development.
